_comment: ZW3D neutral intermediate (.cax.json) as the zw_export plugin emits for a Block primitive (FtAllBox). Read by cadcvt::ZwReader -> FeatPayloadPrimBox -> Replayer. Dimensions differ per axis (30/20/10 mm) so a length/width/height swap surfaces in the IR golden; placement is the box's world min-corner, applied as a translate by the Replayer (verifies the placement path).
